title: WITH table AS... UPDATE ignores the WHERE conditions on table
poc: CREATE TABLE t2 (c3 VARCHAR(10), c4 INT);
WITH t1_ AS (SELECT * FROM t1) UPDATE t2 SET c4 = t1_.c1 WHERE t1_.c1 = 123;
key_bug_features: UPDATE statement ignores WHERE conditions in CTE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
WITH user_data AS (SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 20) UPDATE orders SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE user_id IN (SELECT id FROM user_data);
